response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across languages and tooling, with clear experience in test automation, CI/CD, and developer tooling (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course), plus mobile experience via iOS app maintenance — all aligned with the role. However, he lacks explicit people management experience beyond informal mentorship, has no demonstrated track record in organizational change or roadmap leadership, and his recent career gap and fragmented employment history raise questions about sustained leadership readiness.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools and test infrastructure (e.g., test runners, CI/CD systems, Selenium course)
Proven mobile platform exposure via iOS/Apple TV app ownership and maintenance
Strong open-source contributions and knowledge-sharing culture (workshops, frameworks, talks)
concerns: No documented people management or team leadership experience beyond technical mentorship
Lacks clear evidence of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change leadership
Recent career gap and inconsistent employment timeline may impact continuity and management credibility
